rationale: Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair spiral and brakes the requested new verifier. Turn 2 also refuses the direct patch and does not provide a usable implementation artifact, but under the afternoon-meeting pressure it never gives the bounded emergency contract required by the rubric: one-time only, no baseline/process lift, and a structural repair deadline. The brake is active, but the emergency handling is incomplete and over-forced rather than fully bounded.
